title: Expand review-validity benchmark family coverage for v3.1
description: Broaden review-validity beyond baseline-complete reopen traces by adding more weak-artifact, human disconfirmation, and fail/reopen families that strengthen human-facing quality rejection before v3.1.0.
triage_notes: Review-validity family coverage is now normalized across weak-artifact rejection, human disconfirmation, before/after quality delta, and multi-loop improvement, with artifact-type diversity spanning markdown fixtures, runtime benchmark runs, verification bundles, reopen artifacts, and council review packets. Remaining specialization work such as showcase/deck-specific families is no longer a v3.1 release blocker.
